about.title: About Me
about.bio1: I'm a UI/UX Designer and Front-End Developer with a passion for building interfaces that connect aesthetics and functionality. I believe good design is invisible — it guides the user effortlessly.
about.bio2: Second paragraph about me — edit in src/lib/i18n/translations/en.json

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Have a project in mind or want to talk about design and technology? I’m always open to new collaborations and challenges.
